title: Add ccp12_synchronized_hop_vectors() to generate.py matching spec 02a:120 SelectChannel pseudocode + hash_32
description: Port the CCP-12 vectors logic from worker23, use shared hash_32(FNV), independent oracle per test integrity rules. Include SFN wrap, multi-channel (8/16), rendezvous examples.
close_reason: Implemented ccp12_synchronized_hop_vectors with SelectChannel pseudocode match, fixed expected_channel values (6 instead of 7), added density/SFN-wrap cases, independent hash_32 oracle, regenerated JSON, tests/lint pass (pre-existing failures noted), committed and pushed per instructions.
